subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to fetch top 5 publishers by spend in Q4 2024 (October-December 2024), including total spend, transaction count, and any available vendor health/performance indicators

Reconcile top 5 publishers spend data with vendor performance/health metrics and historical trends; classify each publisher's at-risk status based on spend patterns, contract status, and performance signals; generate summary and recommendations for SAM team

plan.cost_rationale: 2 subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) for a multi-table Q4 spend query with aggregation and filtering—moderately complex but single concern; (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to combine the SQL results with vendor health signals and produce at-risk classification and SAM summary—requires multi-signal reasoning but not extreme complexity. Avoided adding a separate policy_action because at-risk assessment is a classification/posture decision, not a policy compliance check. No extraction needed—the query is purely analytical. Minimal decomposition keeps cost down while fully addressing the user's two-part request (SQL generation + at-risk summary).

output.sql: SELECT cf.publisher, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(cf.event_id) AS transaction_count, AVG(cf.amount_usd) AS avg_transaction_value, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, MIN(cf.event_date) AS first_event_date, MAX(cf.event_date) AS last_event_date, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS distinct_licenses, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS distinct_users, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'refund' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refund_count, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'refund' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS total_refund_amount, AVG(CASE WHEN inv.amount_usd IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (inv.paid_date - inv.due_date))/86400 ELSE NULL END) AS avg_days_late_payment, COUNT(CASE WHEN inv.status = 'overdue' THEN 1 END) AS overdue_invoice_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN inv.status = 'paid' THEN 1 END) AS paid_invoice_count FROM consumption_facts cf LEFT JOIN invoice_facts inv ON cf.publisher = inv.vendor_name AND inv.invoice_date >= '2024-10-01' AND inv.invoice_date <= '2024-12-31' WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND cf.fiscal_quarter = 4 AND cf.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY cf.publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5
